# MAVLink command execution interface

`IFC-mavlink-cmd`

| kind | status | conformance_level |
|---|---|---|
| interface | draft | structural |

Execute a mission command by translating it into the appropriate MAVLink message sequence. The executor owns all pixel-to-GPS conversion and altitude-floor enforcement.

## Operations

- `execute(command: TYP-mission-command) -> None`

_No trace links._
